mapper.select: select cmt_no, bo_no, cmt_writer, cmt_content, cmt_group, cmt_ord, cmt_depth, cmt_date, cmt_status, (select mem_profileimg from noticemember nm where nc.cmt_writer = nm.mem_id) as mem_profileimg from noticecomment nc where bo_no = #{boNo} order by cmt_group asc, cmt_ord asc
mapper.insert: insert into noticecomment( cmt_no, bo_no, cmt_writer, cmt_content, cmt_group, cmt_ord, cmt_depth, cmt_date, cmt_status )values( seq_noticecomment.nextval,#{boNo},#{cmtWriter},#{cmtContent}, (select cmt_group from noticecomment where cmt_no=#{cmtNo}), (select max(cmt_ord) from noticecomment where cmt_group= (select cmt_group from noticecomment where cmt_no = #{cmtNo}))+1, (select cmt_depth from noticecomment where cmt_no = #{cmtNo})+1, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.update: update noticecomment set cmt_content = #{cmtContent}, cmt_date = sysdate where cmt_no =#{cmtNo} and bo_no = #{boNo}
